subcodes.first_line: O thou melodious nightingale warbling in the gardens of the Covenant! Though this servant delayeth in writing [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایها العندلیب الصادح فی ریاض المیثاق هر چند این عبد در تحریر تاخیر مینماید
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @consolation and comfort, @firmness in the Covenant, @call to action
